properties.title: Modern Two-Bedroom House in Own Compound
properties.description:
A modern and well-finished two-bedroom house in a private own compound, ideal for professionals, couples, and small families looking for comfort, privacy, and convenience. The house features a spacious living room, well-lit bedrooms, modern bathrooms, neat common areas, and a clean compound with secure parking space.

The property is designed with bright interiors, quality finishes, tiled floors, large windows, and a functional layout that gives residents both comfort and privacy.

Key Features
Secure own compound
Spacious living room
Two well-lit bedrooms
Modern bathrooms and toilets
Private parking area
Neat compound and common areas
Good natural lighting
Suitable for small families and professionals
Reliable management support
Close to offices, schools, shops, and key amenities
